component.name: Tempest
component.summary: Weather applet for COSMIC Desktop with automatic location detection

description.p: Tempest is a weather applet for the COSMIC Desktop environment that provides real-time weather information with automatic location detection. It displays current conditions, temperature, and AQI directly in your panel.

ul.li: Real-time weather data from Open-Meteo API (no API key required)
Automatic location detection via IP geolocation
Customizable panel display (temperature, icon, AQI, pressure, dew point, sunrise/sunset)
Tabbed popup interface with weather, air quality, alerts, forecasts, and settings
Current conditions including temperature, feels-like, and humidity
Wind information with speed, direction compass, and gusts
UV index, cloud cover, visibility, and atmospheric pressure
Sunrise and sunset times with timezone support
Air quality data with PM2.5, PM10, ozone, NO2, and CO readings
Auto-detects US or European AQI standard based on location
Weather alerts for US (NWS), Canada (ECCC), Europe (MeteoAlarm), and Australia (BOM)
Hourly forecast for next 12 hours
7-day forecast with high/low temperatures
Auto-select temperature and measurement units based on location
Configurable temperature units (Fahrenheit/Celsius)
Custom location support (latitude/longitude)
Adjustable refresh interval
Persistent configuration

description.p: Restore version and support info to settings

ul.li: Restored version display and Ko-fi tip button to settings tab

description.p: Dynamic popup sizing based on screen resolution

ul.li: Popup height now adapts to screen resolution using cosmic-randr
Popup shrinks to fit content instead of always filling to max height
Added bottom padding for better visual balance

description.p: Tab bar navigation and integrated air quality

ul.li: Switched to tab bar navigation for a cleaner look
Air quality info now lives in the Current tab with a dedicated pollutants subview
Times throughout the app now respect the system 12/24 hour preference
Polished spacing and alignment across all tabs
Added Czech translation

description.p: Redesigned settings interface with improved COSMIC integration

ul.li: Settings tab redesigned with section headers and cleaner layout
Tab bar now uses COSMIC segmented control with recessed styling
Temperature and measurement units use segmented controls instead of toggles
Auto-select units now immediately applies when toggled
Pinned libcosmic to stable commit for build reliability

description.p: Internal code quality improvements and translation updates

ul.li: Added Simplified Chinese translation, updated German and French via Weblate
Migrated error handling to anyhow for better error context
Removed dead code and unused struct fields
Fixed potential panic in HTTP client initialization
Refactored popup rendering into focused per-tab methods

description.p: Panel customization and Australian weather alerts

ul.li: Customizable panel display with toggles for weather icon, AQI, pressure, dew point, and sunrise/sunset
Weather alerts for Australia via Bureau of Meteorology API
Repository migrated to Codeberg
Fixed weather icons not displaying on Arch and other non-Pop distributions
Updated dependencies
Added German foundation for translations
Added French, German, and US English translations via Weblate
Updated all dependencies to latest compatible versions
Added i18n infrastructure using Fluent
All UI strings extracted to translation files
Foundation for community translations

description.p: Panel AQI toggle and code improvements

ul.li: Added toggle to show/hide AQI in panel display
Internal refactoring for improved maintainability
Shared HTTP client for better connection pooling

description.p: UI/UX improvements for better layout on smaller screens

ul.li: Current weather moved to dedicated tab for reduced popup height
Hourly forecast now displays in 4-column grid layout
7-day forecast uses table layout with header row
Tab order changed to Current, Hourly, 7-Day, Air
Alert indicator more prominent with warning icon and destructive styling
Popup max height reduced to fit 768p screens
Weather alerts for Canadian locations via ECCC (Environment and Climate Change Canada)
Point-in-polygon filtering for precise alert matching
Improved US/Canada border region detection
Show alert description in weather alerts display
Updated screenshots
Added alerts screenshot
Weather alerts for US locations via NWS API
Weather alerts for European locations via MeteoAlarm
Auto-select temperature and measurement units based on detected location
Improved popup layout
Tabbed popup interface replacing collapsible sections
Night icon detection using actual sunrise/sunset times
Resolved clippy warnings
Remember manual location settings between sessions
Sync measurement units with temperature unit selection
Added air quality data from Open-Meteo API
AQI displayed in panel alongside temperature
Collapsible air quality section with PM2.5, PM10, ozone, NO2, CO
Auto-detects European locations and uses EU AQI scale
Improved date formatting in 7-day forecast
Added weather icons to forecast rows
Automated .deb package releases via GitHub Actions
Added install-dev target in justfile
Fixed %F argument causing Flatpak launch failure

description.p: Metadata fix for COSMIC Store visibility

ul.li: Changed component type to desktop-application for proper Store categorization
Added com.system76.CosmicApplet provides declaration
Real-time weather data with automatic location detection
Current conditions with temperature, humidity, and feels-like
Comprehensive weather details (wind, UV, pressure, visibility, clouds)
Sunrise and sunset times with timezone support
Hourly forecast for next 12 hours
7-day weather forecast
Manual refresh button and last updated timestamp
Configurable units and location settings
Version display and Ko-fi support link
